---
id: sso-controller-logout-authorize
title: "Logout Authorize"
description: "You should call this endpoint from your server to generate a logout token which is required for the [Logout Redirect](/reference/sso/logout) endpoint."
sidebar_label: "Logout Authorize"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Logout Authorize"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/sso/logout/authorize"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



You should call this endpoint from your server to generate a logout token which is required for the [Logout Redirect](/reference/sso/logout) endpoint.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
